name: forgeloop
description: Initiative-first, milestone-gated engineering workflow for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Grill requirements, recommend, plan, and run initiative-based engineering loops in Codex
interface.longDescription: A lightweight Codex workflow layer built around requirement grilling, initiative recommendations, PLAN.md authoring, milestone execution, active initiative sequences, reviewer verdicts, Git evidence, and a minimal LEDGER.md recovery record.
defaultPrompt: Use Forgeloop to grill this requirement before planning.
Use Forgeloop to recommend the next initiatives from this source baseline.
Use Forgeloop to write an executable PLAN.md for this initiative.
Use Forgeloop to run this initiative by milestone.
Use Forgeloop to run a sequence of active initiatives.
